narrative: STUB-DIGEST-NARRATIVE: Cash position is under control this week, with collections tracking billed work closely and a small amount of aged debt to watch.

topRisks.why: STUB-DIGEST-RISK-WHY: Outstanding balance has drifted well past this customer's usual days-to-pay and reminders have gone unanswered.
topRisks.suggestedAction: Call the account contact directly before the next dunning stage.
